examples.title: Algorithm: Exception Handling
examples.code:
ALGORITHM ExceptionHandling
INPUT: codeBlock
OUTPUT: errorStatus

BEGIN
 TRY
 EXECUTE codeBlock
 CATCH exception
 HANDLE exception
 SET errorStatus to TRUE
 FINALLY
 CLEANUP resources
END
